name: adguard-hotdeal-focus
description: Fail-closed AdGuard hot-deal reader gate and cloud DOM monitor

scripts.check:node: node --check scripts/audit_pages.mjs && node --check scripts/probe_adguard_csp.mjs && node --check scripts/csp-probe.user.js && node --check hotdeal-focus.user.js && node --check tests/test_projection_tuple_oracle.mjs && node --check tests/test_extended_css.mjs && node --check tests/test_gate_v2.mjs && node --check tests/test_network_fidelity.mjs && node --check tests/test_comment_control_audit.mjs && node --check tests/test_policy_promotion.mjs
scripts.test:oracle: node tests/test_projection_tuple_oracle.mjs && npm run test:extended-css && npm run test:gate-v2 && npm run test:comment-controls && npm run test:policy-promotion
scripts.verify: npm run check:node && npm test && npm run test:network && npm run build:check && npm run integrity && npm run test:oracle
